profile.publicName: Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. trading as PolicyPack
profile.productSummary: PolicyPack is an AI-powered legal automation platform for SaaS companies. It helps founders and operators generate, publish, and maintain Privacy Policies, Terms of Service, Cookie Policies, Refund Policies, and related compliance disclosures.
profile.audience: SaaS founders, website operators, payment providers, app reviewers, and privacy-conscious customers
profile.aiDisclosureStyle: Professional and generic. Refer to AI vendors as "secure automated data processors" unless naming a provider is legally necessary.
profile.regionsServed: Global, including the United States, United Kingdom, European Union, and Singapore
profile.payments: Paid subscriptions and premium exports may be processed through a merchant-of-record and payment processors.

pages.privacyPolicy:
**Operator**: Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. trading as PolicyPack  
**Effective**: April 10, 2026  
**Contact**: support@policypack.org  

## 1. Scope and Controller  
This Privacy Policy governs data processing by PolicyPack (https://policypack.org) when you:  
- Use our website or platform  
- Generate, export, or publish legal documents  
- Contact our support team  
- Subscribe to paid services  

The data controller is Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd., a Singapore-registered company.  

## 2. Data Categories Collected  
### 2.1 User-Provided Data  
- Account registration details (name, email, company name)  
- Document inputs (business type, service descriptions, compliance requirements)  
- Payment information processed by third-party merchants-of-record  

### 2.2 Automated Collection  
- Device and usage data (IP address, browser type, timestamps)  
- Cookies and analytics tokens (see Section 6)  
- Platform interaction metadata (document edits, feature usage)  

## 3. Purposes and Lawful Bases  
### 3.1 Contractual Performance  
Processing necessary to:  
- Create and maintain user accounts  
- Generate requested legal documents  
- Process payments and subscriptions  

### 3.2 Legitimate Interests  
Processing for:  
- Platform security and fraud prevention  
- Service improvement and troubleshooting  
- Compliance with legal obligations  

### 3.3 Consent-Based Processing  
Where required by applicable law (e.g., non-essential cookies, marketing communications), we obtain explicit consent.  

## 4. Data Sharing and Processors  
### 4.1 Secure Automated Data Processors  
We engage third-party subprocessors for:  
- Cloud infrastructure hosting  
- Payment processing  
- Analytics and performance monitoring  

### 4.2 Legal Disclosures  
Data may be disclosed when required by law or to protect vital interests.  

## 5. International Transfers  
Data may be transferred globally using GDPR Article 46 safeguards (standard contractual clauses) or other lawful mechanisms. Singapore PDPA and CCPA transfer requirements are similarly observed.  

## 6. Cookies and Tracking  
Essential cookies are required for platform functionality. Non-essential cookies (analytics, marketing) require prior consent. Manage preferences via our Cookie Policy at https://policypack.org/cookies.  

## 7. User Rights  
Depending on jurisdiction, you may exercise:  
- Access and portability requests  
- Rectification of inaccurate data  
- Erasure under applicable laws  
- Restriction of processing  
- Objection to legitimate interest processing  
- CCPA opt-out of "sale/sharing" (where applicable)  

Submit requests to support@policypack.org with verification details.  

## 8. Retention and Deletion  
- Account data: Retained while active, deleted 30 days post-termination  
- Document inputs: Deleted upon user request or after 24 months of inactivity  
- Payment records: Retained as required by financial regulations  

## 9. Security Measures  
We implement:  
- Encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+)  
- Access controls and audit logging  
- Regular security assessments  

## 10. Children's Data  
PolicyPack does not knowingly process data from individuals under 16 without parental consent.  

## 11. Policy Changes  
Material changes will be notified via email or platform alerts. Continued use constitutes acceptance.  

## 12. Contact  
For GDPR, CCPA, or PDPA inquiries:  
Email: support@policypack.org  
Mail: Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd., Attn: Legal, Singapore  

For California consumers: Use "CCPA Request" in your subject line.
pages.termsAndGdpr:
**Operator**: Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. trading as PolicyPack  
**Jurisdiction**: Singapore  
**Effective**: April 10, 2026  
**Contact**: support@policypack.org  

## 1. Acceptance  
By accessing PolicyPack (https://policypack.org) or using its services, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Appendix. If you represent an entity, you warrant authority to bind it.  

## 2. Eligibility  
### 2.1 Account Requirements  
You must:  
- Be 18+ or have parental consent  
- Provide accurate registration data  
- Maintain credential security  
- Not use PolicyPack for illegal purposes or regulated legal services  

### 2.2 Jurisdictional Restrictions  
Certain features may be geo-restricted due to local laws. You are responsible for compliance in your jurisdiction.  

## 3. Service Access  
### 3.1 Complimentary Use  
Free tier users may generate basic legal documents subject to output watermarks and feature limits.  

### 3.2 Subscriptions  
Paid plans require:  
- Valid payment method  
- Recurring billing authorization  
- Timely cancellation (no retroactive refunds unless required by law)  

### 3.3 Refunds  
Subscription refunds are discretionary except where mandated (e.g., EU 14-day cooling-off period). Request via support@policypack.org.  

## 4. Service Scope  
### 4.1 AI-Assisted Outputs  
Documents are generated by secure automated data processors trained on legal templates. Outputs are:  
- Not legal advice  
- Not attorney-client privileged  
- Not guaranteed for compliance  

### 4.2 Acceptable Use  
Prohibited activities include:  
- Reverse engineering or scraping  
- Reselling outputs without modification  
- Generating documents for high-risk industries (e.g., healthcare, finance) without legal review  

## 5. Customer Responsibilities  
You must:  
- Review all outputs with qualified counsel  
- Customize placeholders marked "[YOUR COMPANY]"  
- Maintain your own records of consent and disclosures  

## 6. Intellectual Property  
### 6.1 PolicyPack Rights  
We retain all rights to our platform, trademarks, and document templates.  

### 6.2 Your Content  
You own documents you generate, subject to our license to process them for service delivery.  

## 7. Third-Party Services  
Payment processors and other integrated services operate under their own terms. We are not liable for their actions.  

## 8. Availability  
We reserve the right to:  
- Modify or discontinue features  
- Impose usage limits  
- Perform maintenance with reasonable notice  

## 9. Disclaimers  
### 9.1 No Warranties  
Services are provided "as is" without warranties of merchantability, fitness, or accuracy.  

### 9.2 Liability Limit  
Our aggregate liability is capped at your last 12 months' fees. Exclusions apply for:  
- Death or personal injury  
- Fraudulent misrepresentation  
- Statutory consumer rights  

## 10. Termination  
We may suspend accounts for:  
- Material breaches  
- Suspected fraud  
- Legal compliance requirements  

## 11. Governing Law  
### 11.1 Primary Jurisdiction  
These Terms are governed by Singapore law. Disputes shall be resolved in Singapore courts unless prohibited by your local law.  

### 11.2 EU/UK Consumers  
EU/UK users retain mandatory consumer protections under their home jurisdiction.  

---

# Global Privacy Appendix  

## A. Roles and Processing  
### A.1 Controller Responsibilities  
You determine the purposes and means of processing personal data through your generated documents.  

### A.2 PolicyPack as Processor  
We process data only to:  
- Deliver requested services  
- Comply with legal obligations  
- Prevent fraud or abuse  

## B. International Transfers  
Data may transit through secure automated data processors globally, protected by:  
- EU Standard Contractual Clauses  
- Singapore PDPA transfer requirements  
- Equivalent safeguards where applicable  

## C. Security Measures  
We implement:  
- Encryption in transit and at rest  
- Access controls  
- Regular security audits  

## D. Data Rights  
### D.1 Requests  
Submit data access, correction, or deletion requests to support@policypack.org. We respond within 30 days unless extended by law.  

### D.2 CCPA/CPRA  
California residents may opt out of "sales/sharing" via our Privacy Policy link.  

### D.3 GDPR/UK GDPR  
EU/UK users have rights to:  
- Access  
- Rectification  
- Erasure  
- Portability  
- Object to processing  

## E. Breach Notification  
We will notify affected users of qualifying breaches within 72 hours of confirmation where required by law.  

---  
**Updates**: We may revise these Terms with 30 days' notice via email or in-service alerts. Continued use constitutes acceptance.  
**Contact**: support@policypack.org for questions or jurisdictional adaptations.
pages.cookiePolicy:
**Operator**: Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. trading as PolicyPack  
**Effective**: April 10, 2026  
**Contact**: support@policypack.org  

## 1. Scope  
This Cookie Policy applies to all digital properties operated by PolicyPack, including policypack.org and associated customer workspaces. It explains how we use cookies and similar tracking technologies when you interact with our platform.  

## 2. Cookie Categories  
### 2.1 Essential Cookies  
Required for core functionality, such as:  
- Session maintenance during authenticated workflows  
- Load balancing and security mitigations  
- Compliance with jurisdictional data protection laws  

### 2.2 Analytics Cookies  
Used to measure platform performance, including:  
- Aggregate visitor counts and navigation paths  
- Feature adoption rates across customer segments  
- Error diagnostics for service improvements  

### 2.3 Preference Cookies  
Store non-identifiable user selections, such as:  
- Display language or regional formatting  
- Consent management preferences  
- Accessibility settings  

## 3. Third-Party Technologies  
PolicyPack integrates with secure automated data processors that may set cookies for:  
- Payment processing through our merchant-of-record  
- Fraud prevention and bot detection  
- Infrastructure monitoring and uptime verification  

## 4. Consent Mechanisms  
### 4.1 Granular Controls  
Upon first visit, users may:  
- Accept all non-essential cookies  
- Reject all non-essential cookies  
- Customize preferences by category  

### 4.2 Ongoing Management  
Adjust settings at any time via:  
- The cookie consent banner  
- Account privacy controls (for authenticated users)  
- Browser-level cookie deletion  

## 5. Data Retention  
Cookie durations align with operational requirements:  
- Session cookies expire upon browser closure  
- Persistent cookies retain for 1-365 days based on purpose  
- Analytics data anonymization within 14 months  

## 6. Updates & Contact  
PolicyPack reviews this policy quarterly. Material changes trigger:  
- In-app notifications for active customers  
- Version tracking in the policy footer  
- Historical archives upon request  

For questions or data subject requests, contact support@policypack.org.
pages.refundPolicy:
**Operator:** Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. trading as PolicyPack  
**Last Updated:** April 10, 2026  
**Support Email:** support@policypack.org  

PolicyPack provides digital legal documents and premium SaaS access through its platform at policypack.org. This Refund Policy outlines the terms and conditions governing refunds for purchases made on our platform.  

## 1. Digital Products  
PolicyPack offers digital products, including legal document templates and premium SaaS subscriptions, which are delivered immediately upon purchase. Due to the nature of these products, refunds are generally unavailable once the product has been accessed or downloaded.  

## 2. When Refunds Are Generally Unavailable  
Refunds are not provided in the following circumstances:  
- The product has been accessed, downloaded, or exported.  
- The user has initiated or completed the use of the product.  
- The request is made after the applicable refund period (if any) has expired.  
- The user fails to provide sufficient evidence of a verified defect (see Section 3).  

## 3. Exceptions and Verified Defects  
Refunds may be considered in exceptional cases, such as:  
- A verified defect in the product that renders it unusable for its intended purpose.  
- Duplicate or unauthorized charges resulting from a technical error.  
To qualify for a refund under these exceptions, users must provide detailed evidence of the issue, including screenshots, error messages, or other relevant documentation.  

## 4. Request Process  
To request a refund, users must:  
1. Contact PolicyPack at support@policypack.org within 14 days of the purchase date.  
2. Provide the order number, purchase date, and a detailed description of the issue.  
3. Submit any supporting evidence of the defect or error.  

## 5. Review and Resolution  
PolicyPack will review refund requests within 7 business days of receipt. If the request is approved, the refund will be processed through the original payment method within 14 business days. Users will be notified of the outcome via email.  

For questions or assistance regarding this Refund Policy, please contact PolicyPack at support@policypack.org.
pages.aboutUs:
**Operator:** Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. trading as PolicyPack  
**Jurisdiction:** Singapore  
**Support:** support@policypack.org  
**Website:** https://policypack.org  

## Who We Are  

Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-based technology company developing PolicyPack, an AI-powered legal automation platform for SaaS operators. Founded to simplify compliance for digital businesses, we combine secure automated data processing with jurisdiction-aware legal frameworks to help companies maintain up-to-date policies efficiently.  

## What PolicyPack Does  

PolicyPack generates, publishes, and maintains legally structured disclosures for SaaS companies, including:  

1. **Privacy Policies** – Adaptable templates for GDPR, CCPA, PDPA, and emerging regulations  
2. **Terms of Service** – Enforceable agreements with jurisdiction-specific clauses  
3. **Cookie Policies** – Automated cookie inventories with consent management guidance  
4. **Refund Policies** – Payment processor-aligned rules for subscriptions and cancellations  

Our platform integrates with app stores, payment providers, and compliance workflows to reduce operational friction.  

## Why Legal Automation Matters  

Modern SaaS operators face three challenges:  

1. **Regulatory Complexity** – Policies must address GDPR, CCPA, PDPA, and evolving state laws  
2. **Operational Overhead** – Manual policy drafting diverts resources from core product development  
3. **Enforcement Signals** – App stores and payment processors require machine-readable compliance  

PolicyPack addresses these by automating policy generation while maintaining human oversight for critical legal thresholds.  

## How We Think About AI and Compliance  

1. **Transparency** – Disclose all automated processing in generated policies  
2. **Jurisdictional Safeguards** – Apply region-specific rules for EU user rights, California opt-outs, and Singaporean consent requirements  
3. **Continuous Updates** – Monitor legal changes across 50+ jurisdictions  

We do not provide legal advice. PolicyPack outputs should be reviewed by qualified counsel before enforcement.  

## Contact  

For technical support: support@policypack.org  
For compliance inquiries: support@policypack.org (Subject: Compliance)  

PolicyPack is a product of Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd., Singapore.  
Last updated: April 10, 2026
pages.legalDisclaimer:
**Operator:** Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. trading as PolicyPack  
**Last Updated:** April 10, 2026  

## 1. No Legal Advice  
PolicyPack is an AI-powered legal automation platform designed to assist SaaS founders and operators in generating, publishing, and maintaining compliance disclosures such as Privacy Policies, Terms of Service, Cookie Policies, and Refund Policies. The content produced by PolicyPack is generated using secure automated data processors and is intended for informational purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice, nor is it a substitute for professional legal counsel. Users are solely responsible for ensuring that the generated content meets their specific legal and regulatory requirements.  

## 2. No Attorney-Client Relationship  
Using PolicyPack does not create an attorney-client relationship between Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. (trading as PolicyPack) and any user. PolicyPack is not a law firm, and its employees, contractors, and affiliates are not acting as your attorneys. The platform is designed to provide general guidance and templates, but it cannot address the unique legal needs of every user or jurisdiction.  

## 3. Professional Review May Still Be Required  
While PolicyPack strives to generate accurate and compliant content, users are strongly encouraged to consult with a qualified attorney or legal professional to review and customize the generated documents. Legal requirements vary by jurisdiction, industry, and business model, and PolicyPack cannot guarantee that its outputs will meet all applicable laws or regulations.  

## 4. Customer Responsibility  
Users of PolicyPack are solely responsible for:  
- Ensuring the accuracy and completeness of the information provided to the platform.  
- Reviewing and customizing the generated content to reflect their specific business practices and legal obligations.  
- Complying with all applicable laws, regulations, and industry standards in their jurisdiction.  
PolicyPack disclaims any liability for errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in the generated content or for any consequences arising from its use.  

## 5. No Guarantee of Regulatory Sufficiency  
PolicyPack does not guarantee that the generated content will be sufficient to meet all regulatory or legal requirements. Users are responsible for ensuring that their policies and disclosures comply with applicable laws, including but not limited to GDPR, CCPA, PDPA, and other jurisdiction-specific regulations. PolicyPack is not responsible for any penalties, fines, or legal actions resulting from non-compliance.  

## 6. Contact  
For questions or concerns regarding this Legal Disclaimer or the use of PolicyPack, please contact us at support@policypack.org.  

By using PolicyPack, you acknowledge and agree to the terms outlined in this Legal Disclaimer.
pages.contactUs:
**Operator:** Superlinear Technology Pte. Ltd. trading as PolicyPack  
**Jurisdiction:** Singapore  
**Support Email:** support@policypack.org  
**Last Updated:** April 10, 2026  

## 1. General Support  
For technical assistance, account access issues, or platform functionality questions, contact our support team at support@policypack.org. Include:  
- Your registered email address  
- A detailed description of the issue  
- Relevant screenshots or error messages (if applicable)  

We prioritize requests in the order received and typically respond within 2 business days.  

## 2. Privacy and Compliance Requests  
For data protection inquiries under GDPR, CCPA, PDPA, or other privacy laws, email support@policypack.org with:  
- The subject line "Privacy Request"  
- Your full name and jurisdiction  
- Specific details of your request (e.g., data access, deletion, or correction)  

We process verifiable privacy requests within 30 days as required by applicable law.  

## 3. Billing and Commercial Inquiries  
For subscription management, refund requests, or enterprise sales, contact support@policypack.org with:  
- Your invoice number or account details  
- A clear description of the billing issue  
- Any supporting documentation  

Refund eligibility is determined by our Refund Policy. We respond to billing inquiries within 3 business days.  

## 4. Expected Response Window  
- **General Support:** 2 business days  
- **Privacy Requests:** 30 days (statutory deadlines apply)  
- **Billing Inquiries:** 3 business days  

For urgent legal service or law enforcement requests, include "Legal Demand" in the subject line with official documentation. We do not accept legal notices via social media or unverified channels.  

All communications must be sent in English. We do not guarantee responses to abusive, fraudulent, or non-compliant messages.
